prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约5886名→6240名→7655名→8379名→4973名，整体呈先降后升的V形走势；2023–2024年位次明显后移至8000名左右，2025年大幅回升至约4973名，为近五年最优水平，显示该校在江苏物理类报考热度在2025年显著回暖；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年85人、2022年90人、2023年79人、2024年91人、2025年96人，呈小幅扩招趋势；2026年计划大幅缩减至52人，较2025年减少44人（降幅约45.8%），缩招幅度显著，将直接加剧竞争激烈程度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名中哈尔滨工业大学（校本部）2026年位列第12名，较2025年第14名上升2位，学校整体层次与声誉持续提升，对高分考生吸引力增强；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线暴跌相关舆情（中关注），但2025年位次大幅回升表明负面影响已消退；共享哈工大校本部学科评估结果，拥有17个A类学科，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、软件工程A、控制科学与工程A等，工科实力顶尖，对理科考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热（2024年热指数均超74），与该校优势学科高度匹配；江苏省2026年高考总人数约52.1万，较2025年物理类+历史类合计约35.8万大幅增长约45.6%，物理类考生估算约37.9万（按近年72.8%占比），考生规模显著扩大进一步推高竞争；威海校区位于山东省，非江苏省内高校，跨省就读的地域偏好相对弱于省内同层次高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回暖至4973名的强势走势、2026年招生计划大幅缩招45.8%带来的竞争加剧、江苏省考生规模显著增长约45.6%以及哈工大软科排名上升至第12位的层次提升，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将较2025年进一步前移，竞争明显加剧；预测最低位次约3525名，区间3123–3927名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）（第三、四学年在校本部（哈尔滨）培养）
- 工科试验班（人工智能加先进技术领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（理工交叉卓越优才计划）（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能制造卓越优才计划）（含机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、材料科学与工程等）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3525名，区间3123–3927名。位次在预测区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（3123名以内）可重点冲刺一档拔尖班和领军班；位次接近区间上限（3927名附近）应以三档卓越优才计划为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5886 → 6240 → 7655 → 8379 → 4973, showing an overall V-shaped trend of first declining then rising; rankings in 2023–2024 significantly shifted back to around 8000, while in 2025 they rebounded sharply to about 4973, the best level in the past five years, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 85 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 79 in 2023, 91 in 2024, and 96 in 2025, showing a slight expansion trend; the 2026 plan drastically reduces to 52, a decrease of 44 from 2025 (a drop of about 45.8%), a significant contraction that will directly intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, Harbin Institute of Technology (main campus) ranked 12th in 2026, up 2 places from 14th in 2025, with continuously improving overall level and reputation, enhancing appeal to high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention; in 2024, there was public opinion related to a sharp drop in admission cutoff (medium attention), but the significant rebound in 2025 rankings indicates the negative impact has dissipated; shares the main campus discipline evaluation results of HIT, with 17 A-level disciplines, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attractive to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (heat indices all above 74 in 2024), highly matching the university's advantageous disciplines; the total number of Jiangsu Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 45.6% compared to the total of about 358,000 for Physics + History categories in 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 379,000 (based on the recent 72.8% proportion), and the substantial expansion of examinee numbers further drives up competition; the Weihai campus is located in Shandong Province, not within Jiangsu Province, so the regional preference for cross-province study is relatively weaker compared to universities of the same level within the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound of rankings to 4973 in 2025, the intensified competition due to a 45.8% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 45.6% in the number of Jiangsu examinees, and the rise of HIT's Soft Science ranking to 12th, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will further advance compared to 2025, with competition notably intensifying; the predicted minimum ranking is about 3525, with a range of 3123–3927.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) (Third and fourth years cultivated at main campus (Harbin))
- Engineering Experimental Class (Artificial Intelligence and Advanced Technology Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Science-Engineering Cross Excellence Elite Plan) (Including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Software Engineering (Excellence Elite Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellence Elite Plan) (Including Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design Manufacturing and Automation, Materials Science and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 3525, range 3123–3927. If ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to use Tier 2 as the main focus, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety; if ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 3123), focus on reaching for Tier 1 top classes and leading classes; if ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 3927), mainly use Tier 3 Excellence Elite Plans with Tier 2 as a supplement.
